languages.text: "Я осмотрел{mf||а} Нунциуса лично. Он не может делать то, что ты ему приписываешь".
"I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."
languages.original_text: "Я осмотрел{mf||а} Нунциуса лично. Он не может делать то, что ты ему приписываешь".

traits.locale_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."
"I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."
"I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

languages.text: «He examinado personalmente a Nuncius. No puede hacer lo que usted dice que hace».
languages.original_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

traits.locale_text: «He examinado personalmente a Nuncius. No puede hacer lo que usted dice que hace».

languages.text: “我亲自检查过努恩修斯。他根本做不到你说的那些事。”
languages.original_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

traits.locale_text: “我亲自检查过努恩修斯。他根本做不到你说的那些事。”

languages.text: « J'ai examiné Nuncius moi-même. Il est incapable de faire ce que vous prétendez. »
languages.original_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai examiné Nuncius moi-même. Il est incapable de faire ce que vous prétendez. »

languages.text: "Ich habe Nuncius persönlich untersucht. Er kann nichts von dem, was Ihr behauptet."
languages.original_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Nuncius persönlich untersucht. Er kann nichts von dem, was Ihr behauptet."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスを個人的に調べた。彼はあなたが主張するようなことはできない。」
languages.original_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスを個人的に調べた。彼はあなたが主張するようなことはできない。」

languages.text: "Nuncius'u bizzat inceledim. İddia ettiğin şeyleri yapamıyor."
languages.original_text: "I examined Nuncius personally. He cannot do the things you claim."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'u bizzat inceledim. İddia ettiğin şeyleri yapamıyor."
